text:
Alignment (final and EVAA cycle files) 
Practice 
NPI 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Value formatted as: MH-xxxxxx 
Ex — MH-123456 

COMMENT: This number appears on every MH data file and only has meaning within the MH model. The 
corresponding name of the practice is a field called PRACTICE_NAME. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
